name: Renko brick trend transform (price-move-based, time-independent), BTC long-flat

data.source: free Binance BTCUSDT 15m OHLCV (output/bigquery/btc_ohlcv_15m.ndjson), available_at honored
data.metricNote: pure price transform on free OHLCV; no paid Glassnode/CM-pro needed

construction.bricks: causal Renko on 15m closes (closes only, no high/low peek); brick confirmed exactly when observed close crosses threshold; long-flat: long when last confirmed brick up, flat when down
construction.dailyBridge: position[day t] = direction of last brick confirmed at close of day t, held over next-day close-to-close return; strictly causal, no look-ahead

surrogateNull.method: phase-randomize 15m log-returns (FFT), rescale to exact real mean+std, rebuild intraday path, RE-FORM Renko bricks on surrogate path, rebuild daily long-flat position; return attributed on surrogate's OWN path

gates.baselines: PASS (beats own B&H 0.469 and random-lottery95 0.586 in-sample)

decisiveControl_equivalentlyLaggedMA.note: backlog key separator for HA/Renko: does the brick transform beat a plain equivalently-lagged moving average? It does NOT — a trivial SMA50 daily long-flat dominates Renko in EVERY window.
decisiveControl_equivalentlyLaggedMA.conclusion: Renko is strictly inferior to a vanilla moving-average trend filter and underperforms its OWN buy&hold out-of-sample. No Renko-specific edge.

bindingGate: holdout (and deflated_sharpe at honest N); fails to beat own B&H OOS and dies under multiple-testing
reason: Textbook documented long-flat price-transform trap: Renko posts ~0.6 Sharpe on a rising asset, marginally beats its vol/spectrum-preserving surrogate (p~0.05) only because of weak path-autocorrelation that ANY trend filter exploits better, but (1) cannot beat its own buy&hold out-of-sample (0.17 vs 0.33), (2) is strictly dominated by a plain equivalently-lagged SMA50 (1.06 vs 0.65 IS; 0.87 vs 0.17 OOS), and (3) the marginal surrogate-pass evaporates under honest N=44 multiple-testing (DSR p=0.30, Harvey-Liu adjP=1.0). Pure path/beta, no Renko-specific signal.
